title: Slide Deck
description: Governed input artifact representing a presentation slide deck submitted to a spectrum study working group. Slides are treated as structured technical artifacts, not transcript-like text.

artifact_id.description: Stable identifier for this slide deck artifact instance.

presenting_org.description: Organization or agency that presented the slide deck.

meeting_id.description: Identifier of the meeting session where the deck was presented.

study_id.description: Study identifier this slide deck contributes to.

slide_number.description: Position of the slide within the deck (1-indexed).

slide_id.description: Optional explicit identifier for this slide.

title.description: Slide title. If absent, first non-empty line of raw_text is used.

bullets.description: Ordered bullet points on the slide.

content.description: Alternative content list when bullets is not present.

notes.description: Speaker notes or supplemental text for this slide.

raw_text.description: Full raw text blob for the slide, preserving original layout.

has_figure.description: Explicit flag indicating the slide contains a figure or diagram.

has_table.description: Explicit flag indicating the slide contains a table.

type.description: Content type hint for the slide.
